name: ai-perform:d-intransitive
perform: var exit = lib.contents(room.id).find(function(e) { return e.tags.has('exit') && e.properties.direction === 'down'; }); if (!exit) { return lib.result('You cannot go that way.'); } if (exit.properties.destination) { return { output: 'You go down.', events: [lib.moveEvent(player.id, { to: exit.properties.destination, from: room.id, description: 'Moved down' })] }; } return lib.result('You cannot go that way.');

name: ai-refuse:get-plants:glowing-moss
perform: return lib.result("The moss is firmly rooted to the damp limestone; trying to pull it away only leaves your fingers stained with glowing, crushed residue.");
